hypothesis.pool_type_source: dexscreener labels=[DYN2] => Meteora Dynamic AMM v2 (DAMM v2 / constant-product with dynamic fee)

pool_params.fee_tier_note: Not exposed by DexScreener. DAMM v2 supports dynamic fees; read directly from pool account or app.meteora.ag to get fee_numerator/fee_denominator.
pool_params.bin_step_note: Not applicable — DAMM v2 is constant-product, bin_step is a DLMM concept.
pool_params.number_of_positions_note: DAMM v2 liquidity is fungible LP (no per-user bin positions like DLMM). N/A at pool level.

meteora_dlmm.interpretation: Pool is NOT a DLMM pair (consistent with DYN2/DAMM-v2 hypothesis).

meteora_amm_v2.note: amm-v2.meteora.ag/pools?page=0 returned 200 with empty body (filter by address not supported via querystring). Fee tier should be pulled from on-chain pool account.

repair_hint: Fee tier + exact config not available from public HTTP endpoints reached. To fill fee_tier_bps: (a) open https://app.meteora.ag/pools/2jC1LpGY1ZjL9UerTFDmTNM4kc2AhHydK4tqqqgbJdhh and read Fee %, or (b) deserialize the DAMM v2 pool account on-chain using @meteora-ag/cp-amm-sdk (getPool -> poolFees.baseFee.cliffFeeNumerator / FEE_DENOMINATOR).
